channel.title: Untitle on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Untitle on Blog

item.title: copy_paste
item.description: m = 500; % initialize landmarks = [100]; [D,Z,Q] = perform_fast_marching_mesh(vertex, faces, landmarks); clf; k = 1; displist = [10 50 100 m]; for i=2:m % select [tmp,landmarks(end+1)] = max(D); % update options.constraint_map = D; [D1,Z,Q] = perform_fast_marching_mesh(vertex, faces, landmarks,options); D = min(D,D1); if i==displist(k) subplot(2,2,k); hold on; options.face_vertex_color = perform_hist_eq(D,'linear'); plot_mesh(vertex,faces, options); colormap jet(256); h = plot3(vertex(1,landmarks), vertex(2,landmarks), vertex(3,landmarks), 'r.'); set(h, 'MarkerSize', 20); k = k+1; end end
